featureName: Sprint 3 — Full Simulator Test & Bug Fix Pass
description: Run a comprehensive test of all existing features on the iOS simulator. Fix every bug found. The app must be fully functional: Anonymous dev login, task creation, bidding, chat, and navigation — all working without crashes or errors.

userStories.title: Anonymous Dev Login Works
userStories.description: As a developer, I can tap 'Dev Login (Simulator)' and land on the home screen without any error.
acceptanceCriteria: FirebaseAuth.instance.signInAnonymously() succeeds
User document is created in Firestore users collection with uid, phone, displayName, role=both
App navigates to /home after login
No SnackBar error is shown
If Anonymous auth is not enabled in Firebase, add a fallback that catches the error and shows a clear message with instructions

userStories.title: Home Screen Loads Without Crash
userStories.description: As a user, the home screen loads correctly for both Poster and Provider roles.
acceptanceCriteria: MainTabView renders without exception
PosterHomeScreen shows task list or empty state (no crash if Firestore is empty)
ProviderHomeScreen shows available tasks or empty state
Bottom navigation works: tapping each tab navigates correctly
All StreamProviders handle empty collections gracefully (show empty state, not crash)
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Post Task Flow Works
userStories.description: As a poster, I can create a new task end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: PostTaskScreen opens from Poster home CTA button
All form fields render: title, description, category picker, budget, location
Form validation works (required fields show errors if empty)
Submitting saves task to Firestore tasks collection
After submit, navigates back to home and new task appears in list
No crashes or unhandled exceptions

userStories.title: Task Detail Screen Works
userStories.description: As a user, I can open any task and see full details.
acceptanceCriteria: Tapping a task card navigates to TaskDetailScreen
Task details render: title, description, budget, status, poster info
Poster view shows BidListSection (empty state if no bids)
Provider view shows Submit Bid button
No crashes when task data is missing optional fields
Back navigation works

userStories.title: Bid Submission Works
userStories.description: As a provider, I can submit a bid on a task.
acceptanceCriteria: SubmitBidSheet opens as bottom sheet
Amount field accepts numeric input
Duration chips are selectable
Proposal text area validates minimum 20 chars
Submitting a bid saves to Firestore bids collection
After submit, sheet closes and success feedback shown
No crashes

userStories.title: Profile Screen Works
userStories.description: As a user, I can view and edit my profile.
acceptanceCriteria: Profile tab shows user display name, role, stats
Settings option is accessible
Role switch bottom sheet opens and works
No crashes on profile tab

userStories.title: Zero Flutter Analyze Errors
acceptanceCriteria: Run: flutter analyze
Result must show 0 errors
Fix any errors found in Sprint 2 code
Warnings are acceptable but errors are not
